name: Angel Biscuits #1
recipeIngredient: 1 Yeast cake OR 1 package Yeast; dissolved in 1 cup Lukewarm water
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the dry ingredients.
2. Cut in the shortening and add the yeast and buttermilk, mixing well.
3. Roll the dough out on a lightly floured surface.
4. Cut with a small biscuit cutter.
5. Bake on a greased sheet in a pre-heated 400°F oven for 12 minutes or until golden brown.
